case_title: BAYCHESTER SHOPPING CENTER, INC. VS. WALLGREENS CO.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,591.41 FILED BY BAYCHESTER SHOPPING CENTER, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT WALLGREEN CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-18-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BY PLAINTIFF. CASE SETTLED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY THOMAS IVELI--PRESIDENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF AMENDING MY CLAIM. DEFENDANT SHOULD BE WALGREEN, & NOT WALGREENS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAYCHESTER SHOPPING CENTER, INC.
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,591.41 FILED BY BAYCHESTER SHOPPING CENTER, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT WALLGREEN CO.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAYCHESTER SHOPPING CENTER, INC.
